title: ellisia micrantha
intro: Ellisia micrantha, also known as the dwarf or common ellisia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ellisia micrantha include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Ellisia micrantha can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
